arts.sum: Saka faces “many weeks” on the sideline through injury.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Alphonso Davies really feels about PL transfer as Liverpool and Arsenal show interest
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies is available on a free transfer in the summer 👀🚨

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal need a top striker to make Premier League title charge
arts.sum: It's no secret that Arsenal lack a proven goal scorer, but why have they gone so long without addressing this issue? And would a January move keep them in the title race?

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer latest: Mikel Arteta faces battle with Bayern Munich, Barcelona for star forward in summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta are at risk of losing out on a key Barcelona-linked £50m transfer target to Bayern Munich in the summer window.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka injury latest - Arsenal dilemma, new return timeframe, Mikel Arteta plan - football.london
arts.sum: "It's not looking good, he's [Saka] going to be out for many weeks," said Arteta during his recent press conference when confirming the unwanted news to Arsenal supporters. football.london understands that Saka will do well to make it back before late-January, as we take a closer look at the latest news and headlines doing the rounds on the England regular's fitness;

arts.ttl: Free agent Jurgen Klopp praised who Arsenal wanted in 2020 could actually be ideal Bukayo Saka cover - opinion
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta can sign him for nothing - even before OR after the transfer window ends... 👀

arts.ttl: How to watch Premier League games for free at Christmas including Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur will be playing on Boxing Day with the intention of coming away with victories against Fulham (H) and Nottingham Forest (A) respectively. Both teams will kick-off at 3pm, with Chelsea hosting Fulham and Tottenham playing at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale got 11-word text from Arsenal legend right after Sky Sports interview
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale was sent an 11-word message filled with advice by Arsenal legend David Seaman ahead of the Gunners' clash with Southampton at the Emirates Stadium earlier this season

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urged to complete three-year Arsenal transfer mission by signing £115m striker
arts.sum: Speaking to Prime Casino, Gallas said: "Arsenal need a striker that suits the team and Alexander Isak would be a good fit. Arsenal have been told they should sign Newcastle striker Alexander Isak to solve their goalscoring woes.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can secure £130m Arsenal windfall in January transfer window
arts.sum: football.london looks at the transfer values from Transfermarkt of the players who could depart the Emirates Stadium in January. Arsenal could look to get a sum for him in January but summer is more likely.
